name: strengthenGuard
description: If the proof obligation about an event cannot be discharged because a condition is missing, add the condition as a guard in the event. For example, to prove that a guard `y = fun(x)` is well defined, `y \in dom(fun)` must be true. If not, add `y \in dom(fun)` as an additional guard of the event.

node_id.description: ID of the node in the proof tree to apply this function on.
